_comment: Personas drive permission trimming for C2 (Northbridge Health Network). A persona sees a fixture if the fixture acl contains the persona id OR contains 'all'. ops_director = full network-leadership view (sees everything incl. commercial vendor terms and HR-sensitive credentialing matters). quality_pm = quality + both committees' decisions + the shared CAPA tracker + the leadership/vendor commercial penalty thread (Maria is a named recipient on it), but NOT the HR-sensitive credentialing personnel file. credentialing_lead = credentialing committee fully (incl. HR-sensitive personnel matter) + quality decisions, but NOT the leadership commercial thread. vendor_liaison = least privilege external EHR vendor; sees only the Westgate rollout program signals and vendor-facing emails, NOT internal committee decisions, leadership commercial terms, or HR matters.

personas.label: James Whitaker — Director of Clinic Operations
personas.description: Full network-leadership view. Sees every committee decision, the leadership/vendor commercial thread, and the HR-sensitive credentialing matter.

personas.label: Maria Delgado — Quality Program Manager
personas.description: Sees quality + credentialing committee decisions, the shared CAPA tracker, and the leadership/vendor commercial penalty thread (Maria is a named recipient on it), but NOT the HR-sensitive credentialing personnel file.

personas.label: Sandra Okafor — Credentialing Manager
personas.description: Sees the credentialing committee fully, including the HR-sensitive personnel matter, plus quality decisions. Does NOT see the leadership/vendor commercial penalty thread.

personas.label: Tom Becker — Lumina Health Systems (EHR vendor)
personas.description: Least-privilege external vendor. Sees only the Westgate EHR rollout program channel and vendor-facing emails; cannot see internal committee decisions, leadership commercial terms, or HR-sensitive credentialing material.
